title: Luffy Tries to Join Shanks’ Crew
description: On pages 11–14, this part follows the Romance Dawn flashback and focuses on how Luffy’s pirate dream is formed through Shanks, Higuma, and the straw hat promise.
scene: Young Luffy tries to prove he belongs with Shanks’ pirates, but the adults around him treat his dream as reckless.

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: AND i'm a strong fighter!

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: I'VE BEEN TRAINING!

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: My punch is as powerful as a pistol!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A pistol, eh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Is that so...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: ARE YOU DOUBTING ME?!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Calm down, Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: Let's just have a good time!

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: YEAH! Pirates always have a good time!

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: THE SEAIS VAST AND THERE'S LOTS OF ISLANDS TO EXPLORE!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: and best of all, pirates have freedom!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You guys stop filling his head with crazy ideas.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But it's true!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: RIGHT!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: C'mon, CAP'N...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: LET'S TAKE THE LAD WITH US JUST THIS ONCE...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: AYE!

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: YEAH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: OKAY, BUT ONE OF YOU WILL HAVE TO STAY BEHIND...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Sorry, Lady, you've just been Beached! Let's drink!

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: HEY! I THOUGHT YOU GUYS WERE ON MY SIDE!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You're just too young, kid.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: MAYBE IN 10 YEARS I'LL GIVE YOU A CHANCE.

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: Cap'n shanks! I'm telling you...

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: I'm not a little kid!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Don't get upset now. Here, have some milk.

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: OH BOY! THANKS!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: See! A real pirate would never drink milk!!

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: That was a dirty trick!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hmph! I'm getting tired of this.

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: I EVEN STABBED MYSELF IN THE FACE SO YOU'D TAKE ME WITH YOU.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: LUFFY...

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: THE CAPTAIN'S JUST DOING WHAT'S BEST FOR EVERYONE...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: THE SAFETY OF THE ENTIRE CREW AND SHIP RESTS ON HIS SHOULDERS.

summary: Luffy tries to prove he is ready for the sea, but Shanks and the others treat him like a child. The scene establishes both Luffy’s stubbornness and Shanks’ protective distance.
